entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop studied for gender-based yield differences in Uganda

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of crops, often referred to as women's crops, including groundnuts

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: GENDER YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference in crop yields between female and male plot managers

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: The country where the groundnut production study was conducted

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The region where female plot managers often realize lower crop yields

entities.name: BLINDER-OAXACA MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to decompose the factors contributing to the gender yield gap

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: Groundnut varieties developed for higher productivity

entities.name: LOCAL VARIETIES
entities.description: Traditional groundnut varieties used by farmers

entities.name: LABOR USE
entities.description: The application of labor by plot managers, which differs by gender and variety

entities.name: PRODUCTIVE INPUTS
entities.description: Resources such as improved seeds that contribute to crop production

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The availability and access to sufficient food, improved by closing the yield gap

entities.name: WOMEN'S INCOMES
entities.description: The financial earnings of female farmers, improved by closing the yield gap
